name: Reece Limited
analysis: REH's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 6% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.8× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$15.9600. Trade idea: entry A$16.2100, stop A$13.4096, target A$24.6113 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
